component.name: Real Vibecode
component.summary: Real Vibecode. AI-Native Code Editing. Redefined.

description.p: Real Vibecode is an AI-native IDE built on a forked architecture, combining the power of an AI execution kernel with a proven code editor foundation. It provides an authoritative mutation control layer and a causal execution graph engine for transparent, auditable AI-driven development.

screenshot.caption: Editing with AI execution kernel integration
